backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the bookstore backend with types for Book, Article, Review, and UserProfile, plus CRUD operations for books, articles, reviews, and user profiles with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Brown Retro Book Store logo PNG was saved as a static asset and integrated as the logo image source across Navigation, Footer, ProfileSetupModal, BooksPage, and index.html.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Lit~Heaven bookstore app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Lit~Heaven app, setting the page title, favicon to the book store logo PNG, and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with a root route wrapping Layout and ProfileSetupModal, and an index route rendering BooksPage.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the book store logo, copyright year, and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper that composes Navigation, a main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column for consistent page structure.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky responsive navigation header showing the book store logo and 'Lit~Heaven' branding, with desktop nav links and a mobile Sheet menu, plus Internet Identity login/logout and theme toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog triggered on first login that displays the book store logo and collects name, email, and bio to create a new user profile via the backend.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Icon button component that toggles between light and dark themes, persisting the choice in localStorage and applying the 'dark' class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and books against the ICP backend actor, including useGetCallerUserProfile, useSaveCallerUserProfile, useGetAllBooks, and useAddBook.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm literary color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/BooksPage.tsx: Books listing page featuring a hero banner, search input, genre/price filters, sort controls, and a client-side filtered/sorted grid of book cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (oklch-based design tokens, literary palette), fonts, border radii, and box shadows, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Lit Heaven' project at schema version 1.0.0, recording one existing feature that adds a book store logo static asset and applies it across Navigation, Footer, ProfileSetupModal, and BooksPage hero banner.
